body.title: Ebook library index — Calibre scan + CSV catalog with topic tags
body.result: calibre_catalog.py written — scans all 6404 metadata.opf files in the Calibre Portable library, extracts title/authors/year/subjects/rating/formats, infers 15 topic tags (ai_ml, neuroscience, fiction_sf, fiction_fantasy, computing, linguistics, etc.) from keyword rules, writes CSV. calibre_catalog.csv committed. Untagged books (3879) have empty Calibre subjects — the rules fire correctly where metadata exists.
body.description: Full Calibre scan, produce CSV catalog with topic tags for reading queue planning. #217
